description_long: This object consists of a set of red and black cookware, including a shallow frying pan and a deeper pot, both with matching lids. The frying pan is wide and shallow with a glossy black lid and two short, sturdy handles on either side. The pot is deeper, also with a black lid, and features two side handles that are slightly arched for easy gripping. The exteriors are a deep red color, while the lids and handles are black, likely made of metal or heat-resistant plastic. The surfaces appear smooth and slightly reflective, suggesting a non-stick or enameled finish. No visible brand markings or decorative patterns are present, and the rims are straight and moderately thick.
description: A set of red and black cookware featuring a shallow frying pan and a deeper pot, both with black lids and side handles. The surfaces are smooth, glossy, and appear to be made of metal with a non-stick or enameled finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the frying pan and pot stacked, both with black lids and side handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the open frying pan and the pot with its lid, showing the depth difference between the two.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the handles and the relative heights of the frying pan and pot, with the lids in place.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the glossy lids and the curvature of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Double side handles, short and slightly curved, made of black heat-resistant material, no visible grip texture, not detachable.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring or pouring spouts, smooth and functional.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible pattern, ridges, or brand markings.
